hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
    path = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
    targets = ['components.html', 'DESIGN.md', 'tokens.css', 'design-tokens.json']
    hit = next((t for t in targets if t in path), None)
    if hit:
        other = [t for t in targets if t != hit]
        print(f'[fx-ui sync] {hit} 已修改 → 检查是否需要同步: {", ".join(other)}')
except Exception:
    pass
"
